name: nanobanana-adc
description: Gemini 3 Pro Image (Nano Banana Pro) CLI with Application Default Credentials (ADC) support for Vertex AI. Works in enterprise / CI / Cloud Run environments where GEMINI_API_KEY is not available.

hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/" && { [ -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package-lock.json" ] && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package-lock.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/"; true; } && cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && npm install --omit=dev --no-audit --no-fund)
